entry.title: CTV-only Vault Concept v0.1.0 release
entry.summary:
The ongoing development of a detailed protocol specification is significant for the programming community, particularly those involved with the LNHANCE-Expedition project. The latest version of this specification can be accessed directly via the work-in-progress document hosted on GitHub. For further details, please refer to the [Protocol Specification](https://github.com/LNHANCE-Expedition/mccv/blob/17ed3e3220b673f1e57746d0b4609448e8064609/docs/protocol.md). This document is pivotal as it outlines core functionalities, expected outcomes, and methodologies employed within the project framework.
Unfortunately, there are instances where digital resources become unavailable, a common issue in the dynamic landscape of online content. For example, the intended link to a discussion about the "CTV-only vault concept" for the release version 0.1.0 does not currently function. However, an archived version of this discussion remains accessible and can provide valuable insights into the topic. Those interested can view this through the [Archive](https://web.archive.org/web/20260530001627/https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/ctv-only-vault-concept-v0-1-0-release/2539/4), which serves as a useful resource for historical data and reference material related to Bitcoin’s technological advancements.
Through these resources, developers and enthusiasts are able to stay informed about the latest developments and participate actively in ongoing discussions and improvements. These documents not only support the enhancement of existing protocols but also foster a collaborative environment for sharing knowledge and ideas.
